summary: Sourcey-generated public documentation site for spf13/cobra at pinned commit ad460ea8f249db69c943a365fb84f3a59042d54e.
adapter: Sourcey godoc snapshot plus Sourcey markdown site build
observations: Sourcey godoc command: npx sourcey godoc -m ../cobra-source -p './...' -o godoc.json
Sourcey build command: npm run build
GitHub Pages HTTP check: curl -I -L https://dangelo352.github.io/cobra-sourcey-docs/ returned HTTP/2 200
Source snapshot packages: github.com/spf13/cobra and github.com/spf13/cobra/doc
Generated API snapshot pages: guide/api-cobra-package.html and guide/api-doc-package.html
Site pages: guide.html, source-report, command-model, flags-and-validation, completion-and-docgen, api-cobra-package, api-doc-package
Coverage notes: generated API pages include substantially more than 20 public functions, methods, types, examples, and documentation concepts from godoc.json.

commands.publish: git push gh-pages branch to GitHub Pages

known_limits: This is an independent public proof site, not official Cobra documentation.
The Sourcey godoc renderer hung in this environment, so API reference markdown pages were mechanically generated from Sourcey's godoc.json snapshot and then built by Sourcey.
